title: hyoseris nana
intro: Hyoseris nana, also known as Dwarf Cornflower or Small Cornflower, is a small, annual plant in the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hyoseris nana include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and skin conditions, and act as a natural laxative. Hyoseris nana can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
